roa.docketEntryComment: NOTICE OF COMPLETION TO 18 MONTH DUI PROGRAM RECEIVED

DEFT'S MOTION TO STRIKE PRIOR CONVICTION FILED
DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS FILED
